_meta.complete: ALL pen20 mons (5 classic versions + 20th bonus lines) from the page's own structured data: exact evo conditions (evo*_req), stages, attributes, versions (egg1/egg2), jogress, sleep times, strength. Supersedes the earlier WebFetch .md extraction.
_meta.version_tags_note: evolves_to[].version_tag = the version that branch belongs to (NSp/DSa/NSo/WGu/MEm/VBu/etc); evo conditions can differ per version.
